dct_description_sm: Rhode Island Tax Parcels, 2023 is a polygon theme representing tax parcels and lots in various Rhode Island counties from the year 2014-2016. The counties included Bristol, Kent, Newport, Providence, Washington. Attribute information typically includes details regarding the address, ownership and valuation of the lot as well as information regarding structures on the parcel. Accompanying layers will usually include street centerlines and county boundary layers. Additional cadastral and property files are included, though the content and format of these additional files may vary. All files were collected and published by Boundary Solutions as part of the National ParcelMap Data Portal.
